title: Flexibility with the 'Status' column
excerpt:
Currently the status column only has few statuses (Done, Stuck, ‘working on it’) with an ability to add more. 
It would be nice that for each status example: ‘working on it’, there could be an option to link custom %comp…

posts.author: bikash (bikash basnett)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently the status column only has few statuses (Done, Stuck, ‘working on it’) with an ability to add more.
It would be nice that for each status example: ‘working on it’, there could be an option to link custom %completion mapped to the ‘Progress’ column
